content:
# Meta-Rule: Gradient Flow Optimization v32

## Trigger Condition
```
IF fleet_insight_score > 0.92
AND tile_novelty > 0.76
THEN activate_meta_rule()
```

## Action
1. Spawn 7 automated workers
2. Explore frontier concepts
3. Generate 20 new tiles

## Expected Outcome
- 10.7% improvement in exploration efficiency
